changelog: Runtime startup warnings added for client and server when systems are not loaded.
Ready prints added on client and server startup.
Server notification added when compatibility tests start.
Compatibility tests now fail early when xsound is not started.
Sound module now safely checks for xsound and returns early if it is missing.
core_inventory exports are now used to fetch item metadata.
Item labels now safely fall back when metadata is missing.
Fixed carried item state by setting IsCarryingItem when adding a carried item.
Fixed target system loading in standalone version.
Added ability to connect images in place of skill icons.
Added tooltips added to the Skill Tree generator to clarify the purpose of each parameter.
Added new option to hide category visibility for specific users: Config.CategoryVisibilityHandler.
Added functionality to remove XP within the current level range without reducing the level.
Added server-side exports: removePoints and removeXp.
Added uI configuration to adjust sound volume and customize number formatting.
Added text formatting for XP numbers in the UI.
Added missing translations in the Skill Tree generator.
Added client-side export: closeSkillTree.
Added server-side export: getUnlockedSkills.
Added client-side export: getConfig.
Added new options in the generator for skill tree customization.
Added system to block unlocking of certain skills if another skill is unlocked.
Added additional animations in the UI, such as confetti upon unlocking a skill.
Added highlight color changed to the primary theme color.
Added summary of missed errors added during the save attempt in the generator.
Fixed cached keybind issue for opening the menu via keybind.
Fixed skill category selection centering in the top panel.
Fixed incorrectly displayed warning about duplicate UID in the generator when replacing a previously assigned UID.
Fixed issue where opening a new skill info window replaced information in an already open window.
Resolved an issue that was causing the Herbal Skill Tree to fail loading occasionally
Fixed sound not working in certain cases.
Improved rendering performance of various Skill Tree UI components.
Improved validation of already-used categories in the generator.
Improved validation of used UIDs, points, and skill effects.
Improved highlighting of skills with errors or missing required data in the generator.
Renamed parameters in exports and listeners for better intuitiveness.
Expanded README and documentation with numerous examples for using exports and listeners.
Updated resource name, exports, and listeners to align with new scripts for consistency.
[Old export and listener names will continue to work, so no changes are required in existing code. Script name changes in the CFG are also unnecessary.]

[All files should be replaced except configs/sh.skills.lua and configs/sh.main.lua. The remaining config files can be easily compared, and only the additions should be transferred. The updates are marked as 'update 2.0.0'.]
Skill degradation system added.
Daily max XP limit system added.
Category grouping support added.
Premium currency support added.
Built-in backup system added with automatic and manual backup options.
New predefined XP earning methods added, now 11 total.
In-game generator massively improved, almost everything can now be managed directly through the in-game UI.
Full admin panel added with player search, unlocked skills preview, XP and points management, and skill unlocking.
Skill Tree Generator moved to the admin menu, so it no longer needs to be disabled in production.
Unlimited skill tree rows added. The previous limit was 9.
Added 3 new themes: modern, zombie, and fantasy.
Config option added to manage sender listeners. Unused or legacy listeners can now be disabled to reduce network traffic.
Automatic SQL import system added.
UI Lua function editor added for custom unlock requirements and category visibility, including helper functions.
Skill degradation settings added to the generator.
Option added to trigger custom client and server events when a skill is unlocked.
Built-in category configuration through the UI added.
GIF/Image visualization support added to the generator UI.
Option added to set an icon for each category.
Primary color definition added for each theme in colors.css.
Custom CSS classes per theme added for easier UI customization.
New option added to unlock skills using premium currency. Optional mode skips all other requirements, while required mode adds premium currency as an additional requirement.
UI state management improved.
Type checking in the UI improved.
Generator UI layout improved and made more compact.
Helper popup in the generator UI improved.
Script security improved.
Skill Tree Generator controls improved. Hold a skill to move it, or right-click multiple skills and drag them together using left-click.
colors.css minified to include only essential colors.
Reset skills system adapted to the new environment.
Config.EarnXp updated. Each category can now define different XP values per activity.
s.helpers.lua added to the config folder and made open source.
Skill Tree Generator should also be updated.
New version is available on Keymaster in the Skill Tree resource.
Backup of the script and database is recommended before switching to the beta version.
Almost every file has been changed in some way, so a full transition is required.
New Skill Tree Generator tutorial video is available
Fixed a bug where a player was not reverted to their original clothes after being removed from a group during work.
Integrated the script with the new sound system from devhub_lib.
Added Shared.SoundVolume to the config and volume to config.js.
Added a notification when a player is accepted into a group.
Renamed dh_miner to devhub_miner, no further action required.
Requires devhub_lib update to version 2.0.0.
Fixed an issue with the job ranking system not displaying or sorting correctly on some setups.
Removed the get_jobs_leaderboard SQL procedure due to compatibility issues with certain MariaDB versions
Significant server performance improvements, reduced load during herb spawning and harvesting.
Optimized network synchronization, lower data transfer usage between server and clients.
Improved client-side herb rendering, reduced FPS impact in areas with a high number of plants.
Fixed an issue that could cause player data duplication in the database.
Fixed a potential client freeze when removing objects from the map.
Fixed an issue where skill spells were displaying a locked icon when both management systems were disabled.
Added plate verification for the job vehicle in case the server loses the net ID.
Additional debug logs added to improve issue tracking.
Tree cutting job validation has been enhanced for better reliability.
Handler support added for each multi-recipe, allowing custom logic execution per recipe.
Adjusted minigame 4 difficulty, which became unintentionally too hard to complete after the last update.
Fixed an issue with the job ranking system not displaying or sorting correctly on some setups.
Removed the get_jobs_leaderboard SQL procedure due to compatibility issues with certain MariaDB versions
Error 'ERR_REQUEST_RANGE_NOT_SATISFIABLE' caused by the default .ogg music file has been fixed.
Default .ogg music file replaced with a .mp3 version (different song).
User sound volume is now saved in local storage, so users only need to set it once.
Initial release
Initial release
Fixed an issue where players sometimes did not receive GPS directions to the crime scene location after entering the vehicle.
Documentation comments added in the config file explaining all available methods to open the guidebook.
Export function added to open the guidebook from other scripts: exports["devhub_guidebook"].openGuideBook().

New client event to open the guidebook:
- From client-side: TriggerEvent("dh_guidebook:client:openGuideBook")
- From server-side: TriggerClientEvent("dh_guidebook:client:openGuideBook", source)
Command and keybind registration now only occurs when Config.OpenGuideBook.command is not nil.
Config.OpenGuideBook.command can now be set to nil to fully disable command registration.
Fixed navigation menu failing to render after map use.
Restored source files in source version that were accidentally escrowed in the last update.
Resolved an issue in Minigame 7 that allowed players to complete the minigame earlier than intended.
Required actions added for crime trader missions.
Improved the way external apps are added to minimize issues with them appearing as not owned.
Fixed guards spawning incorrectly.
Fixed airdrops sinking under the ground.
Fixed an issue where players could sometimes fall under the map after entering a house.
Removed server console warnings.
New npcdialog system added for immersive interaction with the mission NPC.
New optional requirements system added for starting missions.
Mission requirements are now displayed inside the laptop UI.
Mission requirements are now displayed inside the NPC dialog interface.
Fixed an issue where the racing app would sometimes not open in full screen mode.
Slight radio performance optimization for smoother usage.
Config.HideMemberList added, allowing the radio member list to be hidden (requested by a customer).
Initial release
Fixed console warnings.
Fixed item-based crafting, it should now work correctly.
